# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The Azure region where the resources will be deployed."
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Globally unique name for the Azure SQL Server."
      },
      "minLength": 1,
      "maxLength": 50
    },
    "sqlAdminLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqladmin",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator login for the Azure SQL Server."
      },
      "minLength": 1,
      "maxLength": 128
    },
    "sqlAdminPassword": {
      "type": "securestring",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator password for the Azure SQL Server. Must be at least 8 characters long and meet complexity requirements (uppercase, lowercase, number, special character)."
      },
      "minLength": 8
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name for the Azure SQL Database."
      },
      "minLength": 1,
      "maxLength": 128
    },
    "databaseSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "S0",
        "S1",
        "GP_S_Gen5",
        "HS_S_Gen5",
        "BC_S_Gen5"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU name for the database (e.g., Basic, S0 for DTU-based; GP_S_Gen5 for vCore General Purpose). 'Basic' is recommended for initial cost savings."
      }
    },
    "databaseSkuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "Premium",
        "GeneralPurpose",
        "Hyperscale",
        "BusinessCritical"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU tier for the database (e.g., Basic, Standard, GeneralPurpose). 'Basic' is recommended for initial cost savings."
      }
    },
    "databaseCapacity": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 5,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The DTU or vCore capacity of the SKU. For 'Basic', 5 or 10 DTUs are available. For vCore models, this is the vCore count (e.g., 1, 2, 4)."
      }
    },
    "collation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The collation of the SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2147483648",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The maximum size of the database in bytes. Default for Basic tier is 2 GB (2147483648 bytes)."
      }
    },
    "allowAzureServicesFirewallRuleName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "AllowAzureServices",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name for the firewall rule that allows Azure services to access the SQL Server (0.0.0.0 - 0.0.0.0)."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {},
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('allowAzureServicesFirewallRuleName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('databaseSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('databaseSkuTier')]",
        "capacity": "[parameters('databaseCapacity')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "[parameters('collation')]",
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), '2022-05-01').fullyQualifiedDomainName]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The fully qualified domain name of the Azure SQL Server."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The administrator login for the Azure SQL Server."
      }
    }
  }
}
